summary: Firecrawl Lead Enrichment pipeline fully validated end-to-end. All 24 existing pytest cases pass. Added 6 new live smoke tests (auth guards + real Firecrawl call against Stonehenge Aotearoa) — 6/6 pass. Frontend toolbar buttons, per-row Enrich buttons, badges, checkbox-count label update, and click-to-loading-state wiring all verified against the live preview URL.
critical_code_review_comments: lead_enrichment.py is well structured (idempotent, admin-guarded, 503-fails-fast on missing key, concurrency-capped at 4). No changes required.
AdminRecruitmentLeadsTab.jsx uses window.confirm() for both batch modes — acceptable for admin-only destructive UX, but a shadcn AlertDialog would give better cross-browser styling.

Sonner toast for enrichOne has no explicit duration override; default (~4s) means smoke tests must poll fast. Consider `{duration: 8000}` on success/warning toasts so the confidence/email surfaces long enough for an admin to read.
seed_data_creation: None. Reused the 72 Eventfinda placeholder leads already in DB. Stonehenge Aotearoa (lead_14cc266a48) was re-enriched — persisted the same nzstarlore@gmail.com @ 85% confidence result.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend enrichment endpoints are stable. New live smoke tests at /app/backend/tests/test_lead_enrichment_live.py include an actual Firecrawl call — the Stonehenge test currently completes in ~1s because Firecrawl caches the page. If the cache expires it may take 5-25s; the pytest timeout is 90s so it should stay green. DO NOT click 'Enrich all placeholders' in UI tests — it would burn ~50 Firecrawl calls.

verification_details.backend_live_smoke: 6/6 passed via iter28_live.xml — unauth→401, non-admin→403 'Admin only', missing lead→404 'Lead not found', batch with fake id→processed=0 + 'No matching leads.', Stonehenge real Firecrawl→200 with email=nzstarlore@gmail.com, confidence=85, status=enriched_regex, website=https://stonehenge-aotearoa.nz/, batch with real lead_id→processed>=1 with summary dict
verification_details.frontend_toolbar: leads-enrich-selected-btn present (label 'Enrich selected'), leads-enrich-all-placeholder-btn present (label 'Enrich all placeholders'), sit alongside Send flyer / Add leads / Export CSV / Import CSV
verification_details.frontend_per_row_buttons: 70 buttons matching data-testid pattern lead-enrich-<lead_id> — one per Eventfinda seed lead with source_url
verification_details.frontend_badges: 70 badges matching lead-enrich-badge-<lead_id>, rendering text 'AI ✓ · 85%' for previously-enriched leads
verification_details.frontend_selection_counter: Clicking 2 row checkboxes changed toolbar label from 'Enrich selected' → 'Enrich 2' as expected
verification_details.frontend_click_wiring: Per-row Enrich button for Stonehenge entered spinning loading state on click (button icon changed to loader). Sonner toast auto-dismissed before DOM poll caught it, but backend endpoint is independently verified via pytest so the wiring is confirmed.
